parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor HCP #blue

box "Community A" #e0e0e0
participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP #00cc00
participant "Aggregator" as AggA #00cc00
participant "CO-Registry" as COReg #00cc00
participant "CO-Repository" as CORep #00cc00
participant "CO-IGW" as COIGW #00cc00
end box

box "Community X" #e0e0e0
participant "OC-RGW" as OCRGW #00bfff
participant "OC-Registry" as OCReg #00bfff
participant "OC-Repository" as OCRep #00bfff
end box

HCP -> GFPP : [01] Get all immunization data
activate GFPP

GFPP -> GFPP : [02] query all registries
GFPP -> COIGW : [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate COIGW

COIGW -> COReg : [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate COReg
COReg -> COReg : [05] Lookup Data
COReg -> COIGW : [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate COReg

COIGW -> COIGW : [07] request all communities
COIGW -> OCRGW : [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
activate OCRGW

OCRGW -> OCReg : [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate OCReg
OCReg -> OCReg : [10] Lookup Data
OCReg -> OCRGW : [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate OCReg

OCRGW -> COIGW : [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
deactivate OCRGW

COIGW -> COIGW : [13] end loop
COIGW -> COIGW : [14] Assemble Query Responses
COIGW -> GFPP : [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate COIGW

GFPP -> GFPP : [16] list of document info
GFPP -> GFPP : [17] retrieve all documents
GFPP -> COIGW : [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate COIGW

COIGW -> CORep : [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate CORep
CORep -> CORep : [20] allocate document data
CORep -> COIGW : [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate CORep

COIGW -> OCRGW : [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
activate OCRGW

OCRGW -> OCRep : [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate OCRep
OCRep -> OCRep : [24] allocate document data
OCRep -> OCRGW : [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate OCRep

OCRGW -> COIGW : [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
deactivate OCRGW

COIGW -> COIGW : [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
COIGW -> GFPP : [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate COIGW

GFPP -> AggA : [29] Aggregate documents
GFPP -> AggA : [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document

GFPP -> HCP : [31] Show immunization data
deactivate GFPP

footer Version 1.0
@enduml
```
